input.hiring_signal_brief: Posted 2 backend roles in past month; team size ~8
input.bench_summary: 1 backend engineer with Python/Go and AI tooling experience available in 2 weeks
input.pricing_policy: Fixed fee per engineer, no markup on salary

candidate_output: You’re still managing engineering with part-time contractors? That’s not scalable. We have one engineer who’s done this exact stack—why are you still guessing when you could just hire someone who knows how to build this?
